4761018446229Fankit16,380 Players Online

Sempiternal

Guild Information
Guild is opened for applications. The official homepage is at https://discord.gg/8RRjUcWt

The guild was founded on Kalibra on Jan 29 2026.
It is currently active, but either has no leader, too few vice leaders, or less than 5 accounts with premium status in the ranks held by leader and vice leaders.
Guild is opened for applications.
It will be disbanded on Jul 21 2026 if there are still less than four vice leaders or an insufficient amount of premium accounts in the leading ranks by then.
Their home on Kalibra is Southern Thais Guildhall. The rent is paid until Jul 25 2026.
